1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and centroid

2.description: inspect distinct quick-clay risk class values in utlosningomr

3.description: select quick-clay polygons with the chosen high-risk class (attribute filter)

4.description: select buildings in Trondheim by kommunenummer

5.description: reduce kvikkleire polygons to those intersecting Trondheim municipality

6.description: find buildings that intersect the reduced kvikkleire polygons

7.description: compute distance from each matched building to the municipality centroid

8.description: collapse to one row per building using MIN(distance_m) to deduplicate

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, ST_Centroid(omrade) AS centroid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Trondheim%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT DISTINCT skredrisikokvikkleireklasse FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT skredrisikokvikkleireklasse
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr
WHERE skredrisikokvikkleireklasse IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY skredrisikokvikkleireklasse::int DESC
LIMIT 1;

3.sql:
SELECT skredrisikokvikkleireklasse
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr
WHERE skredrisikokvikkleireklasse IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY skredrisikokvikkleireklasse::int DESC
LIMIT 1;

1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and centroid

3.description: select quick-clay polygons with the high risk class (value to be filled from step 2)

4.description: select buildings in Trondheim by kommunenummer with geometry

5.description: find buildings that intersect high-risk quick-clay polygons

6.description: compute distance from intersecting buildings to municipality centroid

7.description: collapse to one row per building taking MIN(distance_m)
